hooks.command: $branch = git -C 'C:\Users\esteb\Desktop\Lectura' branch --show-current; if ($branch -eq 'main') { $today = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd'; $newBranch = "session/$today"; $existing = git -C 'C:\Users\esteb\Desktop\Lectura' branch --list $newBranch; if ($existing) { git -C 'C:\Users\esteb\Desktop\Lectura' checkout $newBranch 2>$null } else { git -C 'C:\Users\esteb\Desktop\Lectura' checkout -b $newBranch 2>$null }; $msg = [ordered]@{systemMessage="Rama de sesion activa: $newBranch. Recuerda que al final puedes crear un PR desde esta rama a main."} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; Write-Output $msg } else { $msg = [ordered]@{systemMessage="Rama activa: $branch"} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; Write-Output $msg }
